summary: The diff modifies useGameState.ts to handle the case where the actor is not yet ready when startGame is called, by flagging a pending first-problem fetch and retrying once the actor becomes available. The file summary for GameScreen.tsx mentions it shows the current math problem in large typography, but GameScreen.tsx itself was not modified in this diff. The core requirement REQ-7 involves ensuring the problem is visibly rendered in GameScreen.tsx with correct data binding, sufficient contrast, and no conditional blocking — but no changes to GameScreen.tsx are present in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the game screen so that the arithmetic problem is visibly rendered during active gameplay — ensure the question display element is not hidden, has sufficient contrast, is not conditionally blocked by loading or undefined state, and that problem data from useGameState is correctly read and passed to the rendered JSX in GameScreen.tsx.
missing_requirements.reason: GameScreen.tsx was not modified in this diff. The fix only addresses useGameState.ts (actor-readiness race condition), but REQ-7 explicitly requires verifying and fixing the rendering in GameScreen.tsx — including visibility, contrast, typography, and correct JSX data binding. There is no evidence that the problem display element in GameScreen.tsx was updated to ensure it is not hidden, has sufficient contrast, or is not conditionally blocked by undefined/loading state.
